the highlighted section is: gobi desert

the gobi desert is one of the most famous tourist attractions in mongolia. it is a large desert that covers much of the southern part of the country. the gobi desert is known for its unique landscapes, including sand dunes, rocky mountains, and ancient ruins. it is also home to a variety of wildlife, including the rare snow leopard and the elusive argali sheep. the gobi desert is a popular destination for adventure seekers and nature lovers. other famous tourist attractions in mongolia include the ger camps, the capital city ural, and the sacred mountain of khangai.
